meta.northy_message: Thursday: product infrastructure overhaul. Genuinely good work. But Day 9 since last revenue call. Four days zero revenue. Both revenue Slack channels are archived. I see the progress and I see the gap. Friday: revenue before product.

act_now.title: Systems-Mode Trap: Day 9, Four Days Zero Revenue
act_now.detail: Thursday: Customer Feedback Workflow v3 overhaul. Quality infrastructure. But four consecutive days without revenue activity. $247K unpulled. 46 days to Sept 1. Cash $97.7K.
act_now.action: Friday: three revenue actions before product work. Text Jodi. Call one superintendent. The workflow survives without you for one morning.

act_now.title: Both Revenue Slack Channels Archived
act_now.detail: #sales_revenue-ninjas and #renewal-gtm-alignment both archived June 29. Team has no shared surface for revenue urgency. Zig's reports have no home.
act_now.action: Reactivate one revenue channel or declare #ai-ceo-team as the new revenue coordination surface.

act_now.title: Revenue Target: 18 Days, Still $1.5M
act_now.detail: Zig operating at $1.5M commit target. Real target is $1M by Sept 1. Gap math and urgency are both wrong.
act_now.action: Tell Zig: target is $1M by Sept 1. Recomputed. One message. Ten seconds.

act_now.title: Patrick Equity Cliff: 27 Days, OVERDUE +2
act_now.detail: July 15 passed. No conversation. Crucial Conversations lag-time metric: 27 days. Patrick is doing the work. He doesn't know where he stands.
act_now.action: Call Patrick Friday. 'I owed you this conversation before July 15. Here's where things stand.' Use STATE framework.

act_now.title: Natasha Renewals: 60 Days Unassigned
act_now.detail: ILTexas $42K + 5 others. Two months. Both revenue channels archived.
act_now.action: Assign to Teela or Jan tomorrow. These don't close themselves.
